title: rostellularia ovata
intro: Rostellularia ovata, also known as Devil's Twig, is a shrub native to Australia and is a member of the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rostellularia ovata include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, coughs, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, have been used by indigenous Australians to treat a range of health issues.
